## [00:00 - 03:01]

Okay guys, so now what we're going to do is we've identified our personas. We've identified the top offer that resonates the best with our persona. And now what we want to do is we want to actually build the funnel. So we want to activate this offer that we went out and tested. Now in my situation here, what I'm going to do is I'm actually going to go live with a live training. So I've identified that my persona wants to have a training about a Facebook group, how to build up a Facebook group, etc. So I'm going to actually go do a live training first in the coming week. And then once I've done that live training, I'm going to set it up as an evergreen funnel. And depending on how my live training went, I might use that live training as the lead magnet in my evergreen funnel. Or I may decide to record a new training or maybe deliver it as a series of mini videos. So there's lots of different options here. So I'm in the SOP here and I've got two SOPs, one for the live and then one for the evergreen funnel. I'm going to take you through the live one at the moment. Now this is optional. You don't have to get your clients to do a live training if you are doing high ticket offers. So anything over $2,000. Just bear in mind that webinars will work the best for this. So to pitch strategy calls essentially. So it's always a great idea to get your client to do it as a live first because there's nothing like a live audience to tell you whether or not it works rather than setting up a whole funnel around a piece of training that isn't validated yet and then only to find out two to three weeks later that the training is the bottleneck and it's not going to work and they have to record a new one. So live training is really bypass a lot of that time and it gives your client practice and it gives them a way to test the feedback, the response from their audience in real time. So for the live training SOP here are the steps. So the first thing I'm going to do is I'm going to be using many chat and I'm going to create a landing page for people to opt in through. I will then set up an email list through my email system. I'm going to integrate my bot with my CRM and then I'm going to go and basically create the ad to promote this landing page. This is pretty much going to be the same exact copy as what I use in my rapid fire testing but it's going to be set up as a conversion objective ad instead of a lead ad. I will then set up the retargeting and get that ready to go so that when we go live we have the retargeting ready to basically push go on and there's not going to be any pending reviews or anything like that. And then I'm going to set up the reminders. So I'm going to set up the reminders for my bot subscribers and then the reminders for

my email subscribers. So this is the process we're going to follow now. I'm going to take you through into many chat right now and show you how to build the landing page.
